narrative:
Lewis Twp township has 1,622 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
